zh.lifeSummary: Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten是Konrad I. VON KIRCHBERG和Berchta VON EBERSTALL的兒子，於1209年出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 素爾素爾 阿姆 內卡吉賀格。他和Uta von Neuffen至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1283年在他的家鄉享年74歲。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Eberhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten was born in 1209, in Kirchberg, Sulz am Neckar, Sulz, Württemberg, Germany as the son of Konrad I. VON KIRCHBERG and Berchta VON EBERSTALL. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Uta von Neuffen. He died in 1283, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

ko.lifeSummary: Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten(은)는 1209년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 설즈 설즈 아 니c카르 커ch버그에서 Konrad I. VON KIRCHBERG(와)과 Berchta VON EBERSTALL의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Uta von Neuffen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten родился в 1209 г. в местности кирчбирг, сулз ам неккар, обирамт сулз, вuрттембирг, Германия. Его родителей звали Konrad I. VON KIRCHBERG и Berchta VON EBERSTALL. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Uta von Neuffen. Он умер в 1283 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten nació en 1209, en Kirchberg, Sulz am Neckar, Oberamt Sulz, Württemberg, Alemania como hijo de Konrad I. VON KIRCHBERG y Berchta VON EBERSTALL. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Uta von Neuffen. Murió en 1283, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
